equipment.label: Head
equipment.name: Brand of the Ashen Oath Hat

explanations: Finalists were recalculated through the complete build calculator.
Known set effects were included.
Set bonus active: Nine Lives Set at 2 pieces (2/5 equipped).
Set bonus active: Chaos Harbinger at 2 pieces (6/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Chaos Harbinger at 4 pieces (6/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Chaos Harbinger at 6 pieces (6/6 equipped).

Heroic Calanthia's Implement of Finality: Effect 1: Critical Hit Chance +400 — feeds #1 PvP Melee Critical Hit Chance; alternatives: Strength +20, Dexterity +20, Wisdom +20. Effect 2: Melee Critical Hit Chance +400 — feeds #1 PvP Melee Critical Hit Chance; alternatives: Strength +20, Dexterity +20, Wisdom +20.

Heroic Calanthia's Fetters: Effect 1: Critical Hit Chance +220 — feeds #1 PvP Melee Critical Hit Chance; alternatives: Strength +11, Wisdom +11, Evasion +220. Effect 2: Heavy Attack Chance +220 — feeds #2 PvP Melee Heavy Attack Chance; alternatives: Strength +11, Wisdom +11, Evasion +220. Effect 3: Hit Chance +220 — feeds #5 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Strength +11, Wisdom +11, Evasion +220.

Heroic Choking Conviction: Effect 1: Heavy Attack Chance +220 — feeds #2 PvP Melee Heavy Attack Chance; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11. Effect 2: Dexterity +11 — improves no ranked goal; kept as a deterministic tie-breaker; alternatives: Wisdom +11, Perception +11, Fortitude +11. Effect 3: Hit Chance +220 — feeds #5 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11.
Main Hand: Attack Assist Defense supplies +4 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Off Hand: Defense Attack Assist supplies +4 Perception toward attribute milestones.
Head: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Necklace: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Wisdom toward attribute milestones.
Ring 1: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Perception toward attribute milestones.
Ring 2: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Perception toward attribute milestones.
PvP Melee Critical Hit Chance: 66020 at priority 1; normalized contribution +0.760.
PvP Melee Heavy Attack Chance: 18662 at priority 2; normalized contribution +0.076.
Critical Damage: 6250 at priority 3; normalized contribution +0.047.
PvP Damage: 110 at priority 4; normalized contribution +0.002.
PvP Melee Hit Chance: 30484 at priority 5; normalized contribution +0.059; minimum 30000 met.
Max Health: 50129.328 at priority 6; normalized contribution +0.002; minimum 38000 met.
No selected goal finished below the fixed objective baseline.
assumptions: Item Potentials are excluded from calculations and recommendations in this release; same-item selections are preserved.
59 available attribute points were redistributed across STR, DEX, INT, PER, and CON.
This is a theoretical catalogue build. Ownership and acquisition cost are not scored.
Eight passive skills were selected at up to level 20.
Greatsword mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Dagger mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Only decoded-proven persistent Skill Cores are optimized; conditional or unsupported cores receive no invented static value.
The game allows repeated Equipment Skills, but exact scoring activates only one copy in the current fixed-level catalogue.
Exactly three normal rune sockets are considered; normal rune rows may repeat.
No more than one Chaos rune is used per item.
warnings: This is a bounded search, so the result is the best loadout found rather than proof of the mathematical global optimum.
